history.statement: Client spending should stabilize and support better growth visibility in the following quarter.
history.actual_text: Growth stabilized but remained softer than a full re-acceleration.

history.statement: Margins should benefit from utilization improvement in the next quarter.
history.actual_text: Margins improved modestly as utilization trends strengthened.

history.statement: Discretionary demand should recover more broadly by the next update.
history.actual_text: Recovery remained patchy and did not broaden materially.
